commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR sanitizes `summarizeText` output before auto-TTS uses it and adds TTS core regression coverage for reasoning/control scaffolding, prompt echoes, source-block echoes, and preservation cases.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +106. Total +138 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus a read-only Node probe against the PR's preamble regex shows the observed `The user wants me to summarize the provided text about ... to approximately ...` wording is not matched, while auto-TTS directly speaks `summary.summary`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow sanitizer and regression-test repair remains before merge; no product or config decision is needed.

target.title: fix(tts): sanitize summarized speech text
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #90364.

TTS summarization now sanitizes summary-model output before returning text for speech:

- strips assistant/control scaffolding, echoed summary prompt instructions, narrow leading prompt preambles, exact echoed source blocks, and standalone or same-line echoed `<text_to_summarize>` prompt blocks
- preserves legitimate first-person summaries, user-summary prose, inline prompt-tag mentions, and quoted/parenthesized sentence endings before stripped prompt echoes
- keeps cleanup in `summarizeText`, before auto-TTS assigns `summary.summary` to audio text

Final surface after trimming: 2 files, +194/-56.

## Root Cause

`src/tts/tts-core.ts` joined `TextContent` blocks from `completeSimple` and returned the raw string as `summary.summary`. Auto-TTS then used that value directly as `textForAudio`, so reasoning tags, control tokens, prompt echo, or echoed source text could be spoken.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Long-response TTS summaries no longer pass hidden reasoning/control scaffolding, echoed prompt text, exact echoed source prompt blocks, standalone or same-line prompt-block echoes, quoted/parenthesized same-line prompt echoes, or control tokens through to the audio text candidate. Regression cases also cover preserving first-person `key points` prose, preserving inline `<text_to_summarize>` mentions, and stripping bare `The user asked me to summarize.` prompt echoes.

Real environment tested: Dedicated local macOS OpenClaw source checkout on branch `codex/fix-tts-summary-sanitization` at commit `1ea11d78a6`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm exec tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-tts-summary-proof.ts`

Evidence after fix:

```console
OpenClaw TTS summary proof
sanitizedSummary="Concise audible summary."
sanitizedOutputLength=24
targetLength=120
leakedForbiddenTokens=none
firstPersonSummary="I need to keep the key points from today's review. The release moves to Friday."
firstPersonPreserved=yes
inlineTagSummary="The docs mention `<text_to_summarize>` as a literal prompt marker. The release moves to Friday."
inlineTagPreserved=yes
joinedPromptSummary="Concise audible summary."
sameLinePromptSummary="Concise audible summary."
quotedPromptSummary="\"Deploy Friday.\""
parenthesizedPromptSummary="(Deploy Friday.)"
bareUserPromptSummary="Deployment was delayed until Friday."
audioText=Concise audible summary.
```

Observed result after fix: The production `summarizeText` cleanup path returned only `Concise audible summary.` for scaffolded summary-model output, preserved the first-person and inline-tag summaries, stripped joined and same-line prompt-block echoes, preserved quoted/parenthesized audible sentence endings while stripping their prompt echoes, and stripped the bare user-summary prompt echo.

What was not tested: Live Microsoft/MiniMax audio playback was not run because provider credentials and audio playback setup were not available in this local checkout.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tts/tts-core.test.ts packages/speech-core/src/tts.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-tts-summary-proof.ts`

Focused verification passed: 2 Vitest files / 44 tests, plus the production-path local proof script output above.
target.author: monkeyleet

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: MonkeyLeeT
